## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who experiences it? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you rule them out? -->

## Impact

- **Who benefits:** <!-- end-users / developers / operators -->
- **Affected packages:** <!-- core / adapters / server / all -->
- **Breaking change:** <!-- Yes / No / Unknown -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, related issues, links to prior art, etc. -->
